questions.question: Does commitIsLower correctly implement deterministic comparison matching marmot-ts sortGroupCommits?
questions.expected: Lower created_at wins; equal timestamps tie-break by lexicographic event ID comparison
questions.evidence: 4 test cases in 'commitIsLower' describe block: lower/higher created_at, tie-break by id, identical events

questions.question: Does EpochResolver dispatch application messages immediately and add to replay queue during grace window?
questions.expected: onApplicationMessage callback fires with deserialized rumor; event added to snapshot.replayQueue
questions.evidence: Test 'dispatches application message immediately via callback' verifies onApplicationMessage called with correct rumor

questions.question: Does competing-commit detection trigger rollback when a lower commit arrives as past-epoch skip?
questions.expected: When a skipped past-epoch commit is deterministically lower than the recorded commit, rollbackAndReplay restores snapshot, replays with winner, and calls save()
questions.evidence: Test 'lower event ID wins via rollback' verifies save() is called; test 'higher event ID is discarded' verifies no rollback for higher ID

questions.question: Does the future buffer correctly store unreadable events and retry them after epoch advance?
questions.expected: Unreadable events go to futureBuffer; after commit processes, flushFutureBuffer retries and dispatches now-readable messages
questions.evidence: Test 'buffers unreadable events and retries after commit' verifies buffering then successful dispatch; 'caps buffer at maxBufferSize' verifies oldest eviction

questions.question: Does the processing lock serialize concurrent ingestEvent calls?
questions.expected: Second ingestEvent waits for first to complete before starting processEvent
questions.evidence: Test 'serialises concurrent ingestEvent calls' tracks call ordering with promise blocking, confirms start-1/end-1/start-2/end-2 sequence

questions.question: Does grace window expiry finalize state and does dispose() prevent further callbacks?
questions.expected: Grace timer expiry clears snapshot and calls mlsGroup.save(); dispose() clears timers and no-ops further ingestEvent calls
questions.evidence: Test 'calls mlsGroup.save() when grace window expires' with fake timers; 'clears timers and prevents further callbacks' verifies post-dispose behavior

questions.question: Does rollbackAndReplay re-inject clientConfig after deserializeClientState?
questions.expected: After deserialization, clientConfig is copied from current state (or defaultMarmotClientConfig) before overwriting mlsGroup.state
questions.evidence: Source code at epochResolver.ts rollbackAndReplay method explicitly copies clientConfig before state assignment
